content.query:
drop table [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t];
alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_treatment_claim_price_t;
rename object appl.stg_ino_treatment_claim_price_t to deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t;


select top 10 c.*
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
inner join [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t] p
        on c.[poscode] = p.code 


--redact provider taxonomy
update c
set c.[providertaxonomycode] = pt.recode
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[providertaxonomycode] = pt.code;
GO

--redact tob
update c
set c.[tobcode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_t] tob
        on c.tobcode = substring(tob.code, 2, 2);

--redact DRG code
update c
set c.[msdrgcode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[drg_sensitive_codes_t] drg
        on c.[msdrgcode] = drg.code;

--redact discharge status
update c
set c.[ubpatientdischargestatuscode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[discharge_status_t] d
        on c.[ubpatientdischargestatuscode] = d.code;

--redact revenue codes
update c
set c.[ubrevenuecode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[revenue_code_t] r
        on c.[ubrevenuecode] = r.code;

--redact place of service
update c
set c.[poscode] = p.suppression
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t] p
        on c.[poscode] = p.code;

--redact hcpcs procedure codes
update c
set c.[hcpcscode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[hcpcscode] = h.code;
GO

--redact procedure modifiers
update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode1] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode1] = pm.code;
GO

update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode2] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode2] = pm.code;
GO

update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode3] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode3] = pm.code;
GO

update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode4] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode4] = pm.code;
GO


--redact ICD diagnosis code
update [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] 
set [icdcmdxcode01]= ''
where [icdcmdxcode01] <> ''
    and ([icdcmdxcode01] like 'P%' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'V%' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'S06%7A' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'S06%8A'  or [icdcmdxcode01] in ('R99', 'Z651', 'E6601') 
    or substring([icdcmdxcode01], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;
GO

update [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t] 
set [icdcmdxcode01] = 'Z6841'
where [icdcmdxcode01] <> ''
    and [icdcmdxcode01] in ('Z684', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')
;
GO
